title: angelica paeoniifolia
intro: Angelica paeoniifolia, also known as Bai Zhi, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the carrot family (Apiaceae). It is traditionally used in Asian medicine, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant's health benefits include relief from menstrual cramps, headaches, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and reduce fever. Angelica paeoniifolia can be prepared into various herbal products, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions.
